user.title: wandr
user.description: Generate walking routes from a start address. Loop routes use desired total miles. A-to-B routes use a selectable goal mode: total distance, extra distance, percent over optimal, extra time, or finish-by time.

data.loop_route: Loop route: start and end at the same address
data.end_address: End address, used only when loop route is off
data.ab_extra_percent: A-to-B extra distance over optimal route, percent
data.ab_extra_minutes: A-to-B extra walking time over optimal route, minutes
data.ab_extra_miles: A-to-B extra distance over optimal route, miles
data.allow_relaxed_fallback: Allow relaxed fallback if strict route generation fails

error.end_required: End address is required when loop route is off.
